name: Candidate-Prefix Eventwise Likelihood-Ratio Write
single_primitive: candidate-prefix autoregressive eventwise token likelihood ratio retained until late hidden-state integration
primary_quantity: g_i,e,t = log p(c_i,t | q,h_e,c_i,<t) - log p(c_i,t | q,NULL,c_i,<t)
algebraic_nonreduction: candidate-specific prefix makes both hidden state and log-partition increment candidate-specific, so candidate centering does not generally remove the partition term
load_bearing_cost: exact candidate-specific log-partition over the full LM vocabulary for every candidate x event x token
rejection_reason: O(C(H+1)TVd) decoder normalization plus O(CHT) prefix decoding is not a lightweight full-candidate ranker; removing or sharing normalization collapses the primitive to hidden similarity
no_history_contract: bitwise selection of untouched base scores
exact_contract: canonical exact item-token count is one internal coordinate read by the same softplus-monotone head
candidate_permutation: shared candidate computation followed by equivariant centering
